CI.RCT.Sim 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Minimal Example

CI.RCT.Sim

This repository contains code for the simulation study investigating causial inference (CI) methods used to account for intercurrent events (ICE) in randomized controlled trials (RCT).

Documentation

Guidance for contributing, project setup, etc. is listed here A minimal working example is implemented in the package and explained in the following vignette. Code from the examples can be directly used as template to create additional functions for data generation and analysis methods. A pkgdown page is generated from the readme, help pages, vignettes, … of this package as it grows.

Old Project

This project has many communalities wiht a previous simulation study we conducted. Documentation and code of the package SimNPH can be found on the package pkgdown page.
